turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, I need help with my washer.
Sorry to hear that — what's the brand and model of the washer, and what's it doing?
Thanks — a Samsung WF45T6000AW washer. What's it doing?
I actually smell something burning coming from the back panel.

That's a burning smell from the back panel from your Samsung WF45T6000AW washer — that's a safety hazard, so please stop using it right now, unplug it or switch off its breaker, and step away. I won't have you keep troubleshooting an electrical fault or fire over the phone; this needs a professional. Would you like me to schedule a technician for your Samsung WF45T6000AW washer?
Okay, I'll turn it off right now.
Good — thanks for shutting it off; safety first. Shall I schedule a technician for your Samsung WF45T6000AW washer?
Done — I'll get a technician arranged for your Samsung WF45T6000AW washer, and they'll follow up to confirm a time.

symptoms.description: I actually smell something burning coming from the back panel

steps_given: Shut off power/gas to the washer immediately.
Do not attempt further troubleshooting until a technician inspects it.
